name: h5g-plugins-v2

plugins.name: skill-auditor
plugins.description: Audits a skill file or directory against an 8-dimension quality rubric. Produces a structured READY / NEEDS WORK / DRAFT report with specific, actionable findings on frontmatter, description quality, instruction clarity, reference integrity, completeness, output specification, evals coverage, and security.

plugins.name: slot-art-creator-node
plugins.description: Generate, QA, and resize mobile slot machine art — symbols, UI, backgrounds, key art — with Nano Banana 2. Numbered slash-command workflow (/slot-step-00 through /slot-step-10), persistent project memory across sessions, key-art-anchored style consistency. Generation tools prefer Google Gemini (NB2), including nb2_smart_resize by default; fal.ai remains the fallback when only FAL_KEY is set and runs smart resize against a purpose-built NB Pro endpoint. Either key alone works. Node.js, no Python required.

plugins.name: spine-slot-animation
plugins.description: Generate validated Spine 4.3 proof packages for slot-game symbols, UI/system elements, and avatar state rigs from natural-language notes, separated PNG layers, or PSD-export manifests. Includes deterministic atlas packing, loop/settle validation, browser preview proof, and guarded advanced features.

plugins.name: spine-2-0-skills
plugins.description: Spine 2.0 Skills: validated Spine 4.3 slot-animation proof packages with a compact router skill plus manual compile, diagnose, validate, handoff, and rig-review workflows.

plugins.name: rtk-token-saver
plugins.description: H5G wrapper for RTK: teaches and verifies RTK-based shell output reduction while preserving Claude model-routing and context-hygiene guidance.

plugins.name: webgamedev-structure
plugins.description: GameForge folder structure and no-delete P4 artist workflow guidance for //webgamedev assets.

plugins.name: h5g-slot-math
plugins.description: Auto-invoked probability-first slot math skills for H5G: math/RTP/RMG modeling, dependent-probability audits, simulation verification, and rule installation.

plugins.name: ai-video-generator
plugins.description: AI video generation for Claude — Veo 3.1 (fal.ai + Gemini), Happy Horse (Alibaba), and Seedance 2.0 (ByteDance). Text-to-video, image-to-video, first+last frame, reference images, video extension. Supports fal.ai and Google Gemini API keys.

description: High 5 Games Claude plugin marketplace — slot art generation, skill auditing, token-saving guidance, and other game-production utilities.
